日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

🔨ᴿᵉᵃᵈʸ ᵗᵒ ᵇᵘᶦˡᵈ ᵗʰᵉ ᶠᵒᵘⁿᵈᵃᵗᶦᵒⁿ ᵒᶠ ʸᵒᵘʳ ᵃᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ ᶜʳᵃᶠᵗ? ᴶᵒᶦⁿ ᵘˢ ᶦⁿ-ᵖᵉʳˢᵒⁿ ᵃᵗ ᵒᵘʳ ᴸᵒˢ ᴬⁿᵍᵉˡᵉˢ ˢᵗᵘᵈᶦᵒ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ⁶-ᵂᵉᵉᵏ ᴬᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ ᵀᵉᶜʰⁿᶦᵠᵘᵉ ᵖʳᵒᵍʳᵃᵐ, ᵗʰᵉ ᵉˢˢᵉⁿᵗᶦᵃˡ ᶠᶦʳˢᵗ ˢᵗᵉᵖ ᶠᵒʳ ᵃˡˡ ˢᵗᵘᵈᵉⁿᵗˢ ᵃᵗ ᵗʰᵉ ˢᵗᵘᵈᶦᵒ.🌟 ᴵⁿ ᵗʰᶦˢ ᶜᵒᵐᵖʳᵉʰᵉⁿˢᶦᵛᵉ ᶜᵒᵘʳˢᵉ, ʸᵒᵘ'ˡˡ ᵉˣᵖˡᵒʳᵉ: 🔹• ᴴᵒʷᵃʳᵈ ᶠᶦⁿᵉ'ˢ ˢᶜʳᶦᵖᵗ ᴬⁿᵃˡʸˢᶦˢ ᴸᵉᶜᵗᵘʳᵉ 🔹• ᵁᵗᵃ ᴴᵃᵍᵉⁿ'ˢ ᴼᵇʲᵉᶜᵗ ᴱˣᵉʳᶜᶦˢᵉˢ 🔹• ᴾᵉʳˢᵒⁿᵃˡᶦᶻᵃᵗᶦᵒⁿ, ˢᵉⁿˢᵒʳʸ ʷᵒʳᵏ, ᵃⁿᵈ ᵉᵐᵒᵗᶦᵒⁿᵃˡ ʳᵉᶜᵃˡˡ ʷᶦᵗʰ ᴰᵃᵛᶦᵈ ᶜᵒᵘʳʸ 🔹• ᴴᵒʷ ᵗᵒ ʰᵃⁿᵈˡᵉ ⁿᵉʳᵛᵉˢ ᵃⁿᵈ ᵇʳᵉᵃᵏ ᵒˡᵈ ʰᵃᵇᶦᵗˢ 🔹• ᴬˢˢᶦᵍⁿᵉᵈ ᵐᵃᵗᵉʳᶦᵃˡ ᵃⁿᵈ ᵃⁿ ᶦⁿᵗʳᵒ ᵗᵒ ˢᶜᵉⁿᵉ ˢᵗᵘᵈʸ ᵀʰᶦˢ ᶜᵒᵘʳˢᵉ ᵍᵒᵉˢ ᵇᵉʸᵒⁿᵈ ᵃᵘᵈᶦᵗᶦᵒⁿ ᵖʳᵉᵖ, ᶠᵒᶜᵘˢᶦⁿᵍ ᵒⁿ ᵗʰᵉ ᵉⁿᵗᶦʳᵉ ᶜʳᵃᶠᵗ ᵒᶠ ᵃᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ ᵗᵒ ʰᵉˡᵖ ʸᵒᵘ ⁿᵒᵗ ᵒⁿˡʸ ᵇᵒᵒᵏ ᵗʰᵉ ʲᵒᵇ ᵇᵘᵗ ⁿᵃᶦˡ ᵗʰᵉ ʳᵒˡᵉ ᵒⁿ ˢᵉᵗ ᵒʳ ˢᵗᵃᵍᵉ.🎥 📚ᴿᵉᵠᵘᶦʳᵉᵈ ᵀᵉˣᵗˢ: 🔹• ᴬ ᶜʰᵃˡˡᵉⁿᵍᵉ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ᴬᶜᵗᵒʳ ᵇʸ ᵁᵗᵃ ᴴᵃᵍᵉⁿ 🔹• ᶠᶦⁿᵉ ᴼⁿ ᴬᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ: ᴬ ⱽᶦˢᶦᵒⁿ ᵒᶠ ᵗʰᵉ ᶜʳᵃᶠᵗ ᵇʸ ᴴᵒʷᵃʳᵈ ᶠᶦⁿᵉ ᴮᵉ ˢᵘʳᵉ ᵗᵒ ᵍʳᵃᵇ ʸᵒᵘʳ ᵇᵒᵒᵏˢ ᵇᵉᶠᵒʳᵉ ᵗʰᵉ ᶠᶦʳˢᵗ ᶜˡᵃˢˢ ᵃⁿᵈ ˢᵗᵃʳᵗ ʳᵉᵃᵈᶦⁿᵍ ᴴᵒʷᵃʳᵈ'ˢ ᵇᵒᵒᵏ ᵗᵒ ᵈᶦᵛᵉ ᶦⁿᵗᵒ ᵗʰᶦˢ ᵗʳᵃⁿˢᶠᵒʳᵐᵃᵗᶦᵒⁿᵃˡ ᵉˣᵖᵉʳᶦᵉⁿᶜᵉ.📖 ➡️ᶜˡᵃˢˢ ᵇᵉᵍᶦⁿˢ ᴼᶜᵗᵒᵇᵉʳ ¹⁵ᵗʰ ᵃᵗ ¹⁰ ᵃᵐ ᴾᵀ ˢᵉᶜᵘʳᵉ ʸᵒᵘʳ ˢᵖᵒᵗ ᵗᵒᵈᵃʸ #reelit #reellife #reelviral #trendingreels

𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐨𝐝𝐚𝐲’𝐬 𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 #𝟏𝟎𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬, 𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐚 𝐜𝐨𝐳𝐲 𝐟𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐝𝐚𝐲 𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐋𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬 @𝐲𝐚𝐳𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐝 (𝐘𝐚𝐬𝐦𝐢𝐧 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐲) 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐜𝐫𝐢𝐩𝐭𝐬, 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐤 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐠 𝐊𝐨𝐤𝐨 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐦 𝐜𝐮𝐩 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐞𝐚 (𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐟𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐨𝐩𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐬𝐮𝐠𝐚𝐫, 𝐧𝐨 𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬)🐾💗 “𝐌𝐲 𝐟𝐚𝐯𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐋𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐛𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐈 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐰𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞’𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲,” 𝐬𝐚𝐲𝐬 𝐘𝐚𝐬𝐦𝐢𝐧. “𝐈 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐈 𝐟𝐢𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐥𝐲.” 𝐘𝐚𝐬𝐦𝐢𝐧, 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐄𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐢𝐧 “𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐫” 𝐨𝐧 @𝐧𝐞𝐭𝐟𝐥𝐢𝐱𝐮𝐤 𝐚𝐥𝐬𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐟𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐧 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐟𝐢𝐥𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐒𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝟑, 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐜𝐡 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐤. “𝐁𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐄𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐬𝐨 𝐠𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐛𝐞𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐈’𝐦 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐲𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟, 𝐛𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲. 𝐈’𝐦 𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐄𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧.

Sourav

You sent an attachment.
Harold was no ordinary pigeon. While the rest of his flock was busy pooping on statues and stealing fries, Harold spent his afternoons reading law books through the window of the downtown library. One day, while dive-bombing a hot dog cart (as one does), Harold collided with a newly installed anti-bird net. Not only did it ruin his beak, but it shattered his pride. “That’s it!” he squawked, dragging his wing dramatically. “I’m suing the city for defamation and emotional distress!” With nothing but a cracked sunflower seed, a stack of paper stolen from a printer, and a lawyer pigeon named Greg (who once passed the bar by accidentally flying into it), Harold began the most bizarre legal case in urban history. Courtroom gasped. The judge sneezed. A squirrel testified. But Harold’s closing argument? A powerful, passionate coo that moved even the hardest city councilman’s heart. Did he win? Let’s just say—Central Park now has a bronze statue of Harold wearing tiny pigeon-sized glasses and holding a briefcase. And yes… he poops on his own statue. Out of principle.
tuxiia

You sent an attachment.
Badshah has been taken into custody by Mumbai Police for allegedly trying to send water to Hania Amir in Pakistan. The unusual act was seen as a potential violation of cross-border protocols, though Badshah claimed it was just a friendly gesture. He reportedly arranged a private drone delivery loaded with bottled water, saying Hania looked like she “needed hydration.” The drone was intercepted before it could cross the border, leading to his arrest. In a strange twist, Hania Amir’s Instagram account suddenly disappeared right after the news broke. Fans were left confused, unsure whether the water reached her or if she even knew about it. “Hania ka account bhi udd gaya, pata bhi nahi Igraa usne paani piya ya nahi,” Badshah told reporters while being escorted by the police, half-serious, half-sarcastic. The internet has exploded with reactions, memes, and theories. Some are calling it the “Thirst Trap Scandal of the Year,” while others are just waiting for Hania to come online and clarify. Follow @thetathyanews for more updates.🎀 This is NOT real news.‼️ This post is completely satire. This post is meant for entertainment purposes only. If you are mentioned above and want to take it down, contact me❕

#🔨 Ready to build the foundation of your acting craft? Join us in-person at our Los Angeles studio for the 6-Week Acting Technique program, the essential first step for all students at the studio. 🌟 In this comprehensive course, you’ll explore: 🔹 Howard Fine’s Script Analysis Lecture 🔹 Uta Hagen’s Object Exercises 🔹 Personalization, sensory work, and emotional recall with David Coury 🔹 How to handle nerves and break old habits 🔹 Assigned material and an intro to scene study This course goes beyond audition prep, focusing on the entire craft of acting to help you not only book the job but nail the role on set or stage. 🎥 📚 Required Texts: 🔹 A Challenge for the Actor by Uta Hagen 🔹 Fine On Acting: A Vision of the Craft by Howard Fine Be sure to grab your books before the first class and start reading Howard’s book to dive into this transformational experience. 📖 ➡️ Class begins October 15th at 10 am PT Secure your spot today on our website via the link in our bio!

𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙃𝙤𝙣𝙙𝙖 𝘾𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙘 𝙏𝙮𝙥𝙚 𝙍 𝙞𝙨 𝙖 𝙝𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 𝙫𝙖𝙧𝙞𝙖𝙣𝙩 𝙤𝙛 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙃𝙤𝙣𝙙𝙖 𝘾𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙘 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬𝙣 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙞𝙩𝙨 𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙧𝙩𝙮 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙘𝙨 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙝𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙆𝙚𝙮 𝙛𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙛 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙢𝙤𝙙𝙚𝙡𝙨 𝙞𝙣𝙘𝙡𝙪𝙙𝙚 1. * 𝙀𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙚*: 𝘼 𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙗𝙤𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙜𝙚𝙙 𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙞𝙣𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙚𝙛𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙚𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙩𝙮𝙥𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 𝙥𝙧𝙤𝙙𝙪𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙖𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙣𝙙 𝙝𝙤𝙧𝙨𝙚𝙥𝙤𝙬𝙚𝙧 𝙙𝙚𝙥𝙚𝙣𝙙𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙤𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙢𝙤𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝙮𝙚𝙖𝙧 2.* 𝙏𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙨𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙤𝙣*: 𝘼 𝙨𝙥𝙚𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙖𝙡 𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙨𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙤𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙥𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙨𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙚𝙣𝙜𝙖𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙜𝙚𝙖𝙧 𝙨𝙝𝙞𝙛𝙩𝙨 3.* 𝙋𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 *: 𝙄𝙩 𝙗𝙤𝙖𝙨𝙩𝙨 𝙞𝙢𝙥𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙖𝙘𝙘𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙖 𝙛𝙤𝙘𝙪𝙨 𝙤𝙣 𝙖𝙜𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙙𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙙𝙮𝙣𝙖𝙢𝙞𝙘𝙨 4.* 𝘿𝙚𝙨𝙞𝙜𝙣*: 𝘿𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙘𝙩𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙨𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙖𝙜𝙜𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙛𝙧𝙤𝙣𝙩 𝙗𝙪𝙢𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙨 𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙧 𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙧𝙨 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙪𝙣𝙞𝙦𝙪𝙚 𝙬𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙡 𝙙𝙚𝙨𝙞𝙜𝙣𝙨 5. ⁠*𝙄𝙣𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙤𝙧*: 𝙍𝙖𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙨𝙥𝙞𝙧𝙚𝙙 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙨𝙪𝙥𝙥𝙤𝙧𝙩𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙨𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙨 𝙖 𝙙𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙘𝙪𝙨𝙚𝙙 𝙘𝙤𝙘𝙠𝙥𝙞𝙩 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙖𝙙𝙫𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙘𝙝𝙣𝙤𝙡𝙤𝙜𝙮 𝙛𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨. 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘾𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙘 𝙏𝙮𝙥𝙚 𝙍 𝙞𝙨 𝙘𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙗𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙚𝙙 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙞𝙩𝙨 𝙗𝙡𝙚𝙣𝙙 𝙤𝙛 𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮𝙙𝙖𝙮 𝙪𝙨𝙖𝙗𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙠𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙙𝙮 𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 𝙢𝙖𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙞𝙩 𝙖 𝙥𝙤𝙥𝙪𝙡𝙖𝙧 𝙘𝙝𝙤𝙞𝙘𝙚 𝙖𝙢𝙤𝙣𝙜 𝙙𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙝𝙪𝙨𝙞𝙖𝙨𝙩𝙨

𝑹𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒌𝒂 sent an attachment.
✩ Mercury Mercury is the closest planet from the Sun. The side facing the sun is extremely hot, whereas the other side is incredibly cold. The temperatures range from -150 C to 425. Without your spacesuit, you’d either freeze or instantly turn into a carbon brick, depending on which side of the planet you were standing on. Without any gear, you would survive for less than 2 minutes. ✩Venus It is a real hell. The temperature on its surface is approximately 400 C. Its surface pressure is also about 90 times greater than that of Earth. A spacesuit designed for Venus would need to be constructed of titanium. Without a spacesuit, one would get squashed in seconds, if you didn’t get turned into dust. ✩Earth: Thanks to the wonderful atmosphere, food and water, and everything else that makes our home planet liveable, you can get in a good 80 or more years here. Earth is perfect for us. ✩Mars It is very cold, but the atmosphere is very thin ‘Tyson says, “so the intensity of the cold won’t be as biting as it might otherwise feel at that temperature on Earth.” ✩ Jupiter Jupiter is literally just a ball of gas with a solid core. So there’s nothing to land on. If you were to jump on it, you would just descend into nothingness. The gases inside this giant are highly pressurized, so without any gear, you would get crushed instantly, i.e., in less than 1 second. ✰✰✰ Just like Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune are enormous balls of gas. One would get crushed almost instantly if you attempted to stand on these planets in any condition. . . #reels #funny #reelsinstagram #explore #funnyreels #funnyvideo #viraljokes #trendingmemes #haha #funnymemes #trending #comedyreels #funnymemes #funnyreels #reelkarofeelkaro #ursmile☺️♥️#instagood #explorepage #foryou #comedyvideos #comedy #funnyvideos

Powered by a potent 6.0-liter V12 engine, it delivers over 600 horsepower. 🔧 Acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h takes approximately 3.7 seconds, with a remarkable top speed surpassing 320 km/h. 🏅 Incorporating advanced aerodynamic features and cutting-edge stability technologies, the CLR GTR ensures exceptional stability and control, particularly during high-speed maneuvers. 💨 Originally priced around $1.5 million, the Mercedes CLR GTR is considered one of the most exclusive and prestigious racing cars ever produced. 💰 Its limited production run of just five units adds to its rarity, making it highly sought after by racing enthusiasts and collectors worldwide. 🌎 Join my Instagram, there are regular quizzes about cars and automotive news 📱 #school #mathsmemes #english #maths #sarcasm #memes #trending #trendingreels #viral

🎬 M3GAN (2022 Movie) 🎞️ M3GAN is a marvel of artificial intelligence, a lifelike doll that’s programmed to be a child’s greatest companion and a parent’s greatest ally. Designed by Gemma, a brilliant roboticist, M3GAN can listen, watch and learn as it plays the role of friend and teacher, playmate and protector. When Gemma becomes the unexpected caretaker of her 8-year-old niece, she decides to give the girl an M3GAN prototype, a decision that leads to unimaginable consequences. 📈 Ratings: IMDB - 6.3/10 Rotten Tomatoes - 93% Amazon - 4.1/5 🎦 Watch on: • Prime Video (not available in all countries) @primevideo • Apple TV (buy only) @appletv • YouTube (buy only) @youtube • Google Play @googleplay Follow (us) @CHARMULD for the best movie clips daily 💚🍿 . . . . . #explore #trending #viral #movies #reels #series #horror #scifi #ai #dog #girl #daughter #attack #revenge

Size me kya rakha hai 😂🤣 Tag your friends 🤣 No problem! Here's the information about the Mercedes CLR GTR: The Mercedes CLR GTR is a remarkable racing car celebrated for its outstanding performance and sleek design. Powered by a potent 6.0-liter V12 engine, it delivers over 600 horsepower. Acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h takes approximately 3.7 seconds, with a remarkable top speed surprising 320 km/h.🥇 Incorporating adventure aerodynamic features and cutting-edge stability technologies, the CLR GTR ensures exceptional stability and control, particularly during high-speed maneuvers. 💨 Originally priced around $1.5 million, the Mercedes CLR GTR is considered one of the most exclusive and prestigious racing cars ever produced. 💰 Its limited production run of just five units adds to its rarity, making it highly sought after by racing enthusiasts and collectors worldwide. 🌎

Sourav

You sent an attachment.
Tag your friends 😂 ✩ Mercury Mercury is the closest planet from the Sun. The side facing the sun is extremely hot, whereas the other side is incredibly cold. The temperatures range from -150 C to 425. Without your spacesuit, you’d either freeze or instantly turn into a carbon brick, depending on side of the planet you were standing on. Without any gear, you would survive for less than 2 minutes. ✩Venus It is a real hell. The temperature on its surface is approximately 400 C. Its surface pressure is also about 90 times greater than that of Earth. A spacesuit designed for Venus would need to be constructed of titanium. Without a spacesuit, one would get squashed in seconds, if you didn’t get turned into dust. ✩Earth: Thanks to the wonderful atmosphere, food and water, and everything else that makes our home planet liveable, you can get in a good 80 or more years here. Earth is perfect for us. ✩Mars It is very cold, but the atmosphere is very thin ‘Tyson says, “so the intensity of the cold won’t be as biting as it might otherwise feel at that temperature on Earth.” ✩ Jupiter Jupiter is literally just a ball of gas with a solid core. So there’s nothing to land on. If you were to jump on it, you would just descend into nothingness. The gases inside this giant are highly pressurized, so without any gear, you would get crushed instantly, i.e., in less than 1 second. ✰✰✰ Just like Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune are enormous balls of gas. One would get crushed almost instantly if you attempted to stand on these planets in any condition. Sourav

Why he kissed me,
While I was standing, Sam also stood up. He put his mouth inside my mouth. I don't know what is happening here. He is doing this to me. I was awkward at that time. I got angry and I wanted to slap him. Then suddenly, his tongue touched my lips, and it was a perfect kiss! That moment melted me. I never had such a great mouth. I don't know what to do now. Should I kiss him or slap him? I don't know. He is doing good but do I really want this or not!
I was in a same position, its like i am unable to move.
